nutrition: Calories: 250 per serving, Protein: 5g, Fat: 10g, Carbs: 35g
recipe_ingredient: 2 cups all-purpose flour, 3 large eggs, 1 cup sugar, 1/2 cup butter
recipe_instructions: Preheat oven to 350F. Mix dry ingredients. Add wet ingredients. Bake for 45 minutes.

ingredients: chicken breast, soy sauce, garlic, ginger
nutrition: Calories: 320 per serving, Protein: 35g, Fat: 12g, Carbs: 8g
recipe_ingredient: 1 lb chicken breast, 3 tbsp soy sauce, 4 cloves garlic, 1 tbsp ginger
recipe_instructions: Heat oil in wok. Add minced garlic and ginger. Stir-fry chicken until golden. Add soy sauce. Cook 5 more minutes.

ingredients: salmon fillet, lemon, dill, salt, pepper
nutrition: Calories: 280 per serving, Protein: 32g, Fat: 16g, Carbs: 1g
recipe_ingredient: 2 salmon fillets, 1 lemon, 2 tbsp fresh dill, salt and pepper to taste
recipe_instructions: Place salmon on steamer. Season with salt, pepper, dill. Steam for 20 minutes. Serve with lemon.

ingredients: beef steak, olive oil, rosemary, thyme
nutrition: Calories: 350 per serving, Protein: 40g, Fat: 18g, Carbs: 0g
recipe_ingredient: 2 ribeye steaks, 2 tbsp olive oil, 2 sprigs rosemary, 2 sprigs thyme
recipe_instructions: Oil grill grates. Season steaks. Grill 7 minutes per side. Rest 5 minutes.

nutrition: Calories: 380 per serving, Protein: 12g, Fat: 8g, Carbs: 62g
recipe_ingredient: 1 lb spaghetti, 2 cans crushed tomatoes, 1 bunch fresh basil, 4 cloves garlic
recipe_instructions: Boil pasta. Sauté garlic in olive oil. Add tomatoes. Simmer 20 minutes. Toss with pasta. Top with basil.

nutrition: Calories: 180 per serving, Protein: 24g, Fat: 6g, Carbs: 3g
recipe_ingredient: 1 lb shrimp, 6 cloves garlic, 1 cup white wine, 2 lemons
recipe_instructions: Heat olive oil. Add garlic. Cook 1 minute. Add shrimp. Cook 3 minutes. Deglaze with wine. Finish with lemon juice.

nutrition: Calories: 420 per serving, Protein: 38g, Fat: 20g, Carbs: 18g
recipe_ingredient: 1 whole chicken, carrots, potatoes, onions, thyme, rosemary, olive oil
recipe_instructions: Truss chicken. Roast at 400F for 60 minutes with vegetables. Baste every 15 minutes.

ingredients: beef chuck, red wine, beef broth, herbs
nutrition: Calories: 480 per serving, Protein: 42g, Fat: 24g, Carbs: 12g
recipe_ingredient: 2 lbs beef chuck, 2 cups red wine, 2 cups beef broth, bay leaf, thyme
recipe_instructions: Brown beef. Add vegetables. Deglaze with wine. Add broth and herbs. Braise at 325F for 3 hours.

nutrition: Calories: 150 per serving, Protein: 8g, Fat: 2g, Carbs: 28g
recipe_ingredient: 2 cups fresh spinach, 1 banana, 1 cup Greek yogurt, 2 tbsp honey
recipe_instructions: Add all ingredients to blender. Blend until smooth. Serve immediately.

ingredients: bread dough, olive oil, salt, rosemary
nutrition: Calories: 210 per serving, Protein: 6g, Fat: 8g, Carbs: 28g
recipe_ingredient: 1 lb bread dough, 3 tbsp olive oil, coarse sea salt, fresh rosemary
recipe_instructions: Shape dough on baking sheet. Brush with oil. Top with salt and rosemary. Bake at 450F for 30 minutes.

ingredients: tofu, vegetables, sesame oil, soy sauce
nutrition: Calories: 220 per serving, Protein: 16g, Fat: 12g, Carbs: 14g
recipe_ingredient: 14 oz tofu, 2 cups mixed vegetables, 2 tbsp sesame oil, 3 tbsp soy sauce
recipe_instructions: Press tofu. Cut into cubes. Stir-fry in hot oil until golden. Add vegetables. Toss with soy sauce.

nutrition: Calories: 310 per serving, Protein: 34g, Fat: 14g, Carbs: 8g
recipe_ingredient: 2 fish fillets, 1/2 cup flour, 3 tbsp butter, 1 lemon
recipe_instructions: Coat fish in flour. Pan-fry in butter 4 minutes per side. Finish with lemon juice.

nutrition: Calories: 240 per serving, Protein: 14g, Fat: 4g, Carbs: 38g
recipe_ingredient: 1 cup dried lentils, 4 cups vegetable broth, onion, carrot, cumin, coriander
recipe_instructions: Sauté aromatics. Add lentils and broth. Simmer 45 minutes until tender. Season to taste.

nutrition: Calories: 180 per serving, Protein: 4g, Fat: 3g, Carbs: 36g
recipe_ingredient: 1 cup white rice, 2 cups water, 1 tsp salt, 1 tbsp butter
recipe_instructions: Combine rice and water in microwave-safe bowl. Microwave 8 minutes covered. Let stand 2 minutes.

ingredients: vegetables, olive oil, balsamic vinegar, garlic
nutrition: Calories: 120 per serving, Protein: 3g, Fat: 9g, Carbs: 8g
recipe_ingredient: 2 zucchini, 2 bell peppers, 1 eggplant, 3 tbsp olive oil, 2 tbsp balsamic vinegar
recipe_instructions: Slice vegetables. Brush with oil. Grill until tender. Drizzle with balsamic vinegar.

nutrition: Calories: 380 per serving, Protein: 36g, Fat: 20g, Carbs: 6g
recipe_ingredient: 4 chicken thighs, 2 tbsp paprika, 6 cloves garlic, 1 onion, olive oil
recipe_instructions: Brown chicken. Transfer to baking dish with vegetables. Bake at 400F for 30 minutes.

nutrition: Calories: 70 per serving, Protein: 6g, Fat: 5g, Carbs: 1g
recipe_ingredient: 4 eggs, water, 2 tbsp white vinegar, salt to taste
recipe_instructions: Bring water and vinegar to simmer. Create whirlpool. Gently slide eggs in. Cook 3-4 minutes.

ingredients: pizza dough, tomato sauce, mozzarella, basil
nutrition: Calories: 290 per slice, Protein: 12g, Fat: 10g, Carbs: 36g
recipe_ingredient: 1 lb pizza dough, 1 cup tomato sauce, 2 cups shredded mozzarella, fresh basil
recipe_instructions: Shape dough on pizza stone. Spread sauce. Top with cheese. Bake at 475F for 15 minutes. Add basil.

ingredients: dumplings, water, soy sauce, sesame oil
nutrition: Calories: 160 per serving, Protein: 8g, Fat: 5g, Carbs: 20g
recipe_ingredient: 12 pork dumplings, water for steaming, 3 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp sesame oil
recipe_instructions: Place dumplings in steamer. Steam for 15 minutes. Serve with dipping sauce.

nutrition: Calories: 95 per serving, Protein: 2g, Fat: 5g, Carbs: 12g
recipe_ingredient: 1 small pumpkin, 2 tbsp olive oil, 1 tsp cinnamon, 1/2 tsp nutmeg
recipe_instructions: Cut pumpkin into wedges. Brush with oil. Season. Roast at 400F for 35 minutes until tender.

nutrition: Calories: 320 per serving, Protein: 4g, Fat: 18g, Carbs: 38g
recipe_ingredient: 2 lbs potatoes, salt to taste, 3 sprigs fresh rosemary, 1/4 cup olive oil
recipe_instructions: Cut potatoes into wedges. Toss with oil, salt, rosemary. Bake at 425F for 25 minutes.
